tasks.subject: Task 1: ClimateArchetype model
tasks.description:
Pure enum of 13 climate archetypes carrying base day temp + clear-sky diurnal range per season, humidity, windiness(rollBonus), displayName via L(). See plan Task 1.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Hesindion/Models/ClimateArchetype.swift", "HesindionTests/ClimateArchetypeTests.swift"], "verifyCommand": "make test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["13 archetypes with per-season base temp + range, humidity, windiness", "ranges monotonic summer>=SA>=winter", "displayName via L()"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: WeatherRegion two-layer + MacroRegion + legacy mapping + Strings
tasks.description:
Replace 13 zones with ~23 named regions grouped by MacroRegion, each -> archetype; resolve(persisted:) maps legacy raw values; EN+DE Strings. See plan Task 2.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Hesindion/Models/WeatherEnums.swift", "Hesindion/Theme/Strings.swift", "HesindionTests/WeatherEnumsTests.swift"], "verifyCommand": "make test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["~23 regions each map to archetype+macro+displayName", "resolve() handles all legacy raw values", "EN+DE keys for region/macro/climate"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: AventurianDate ordinal + adding(days:)
tasks.description:
Add ordinal() total ordering (365-day year) and adding(days:) to AventurianDate. See plan Task 3.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Hesindion/Models/AventurianCalendar.swift", "HesindionTests/AventurianDateTests.swift"], "verifyCommand": "make test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["ordinal strictly increasing", "adding == repeated next", "year is 365 days"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: WeatherGenerator diurnal-range rewrite + softened day modifiers
tasks.description:
Archetype-keyed generator; night = day - (clearSkyRange x cloudFactor - windReduction + jitter, floor 2); softened day cloud/wind mods; cloudFromRoll(_:humidity:). See plan Task 4.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Hesindion/Services/WeatherGenerator.swift", "Hesindion/Models/WeatherEnums.swift", "Hesindion/Models/ClimateArchetype.swift", "HesindionTests/WeatherGeneratorTests.swift"], "verifyCommand": "make test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["archetype-keyed generator, no desert/windy params", "night<day, range in [2, clearSky+2]", "temperate summer nights not freezing", "desert day <=50", "dry vs humid cloud bias"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Model changes — per-day region & manual overrides; drop desert/windy
tasks.description:
WeatherDay gains regionRaw (fallback to adventure.region), WeatherField overrides, diurnalRange, init(from:region:); Adventure drops desert/windy; fix call sites for green build. See plan Task 5.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Hesindion/Models/WeatherDay.swift", "Hesindion/Models/Adventure.swift", "Hesindion/Views/AdventureDetailView.swift", "Hesindion/Views/BulkGenerateSheet.swift", "HesindionTests/WeatherDayModelTests.swift"], "verifyCommand": "make test && make build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["per-day region with adventure fallback + legacy resolve", "WeatherField overrides round-trip", "Adventure drops desert/windy", "app builds"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: RegionPicker component + update AdventureCreationSheet
tasks.description:
Reusable grouped RegionPicker (Section per MacroRegion); creation sheet uses it, drops desert/windy. See plan Task 6.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Hesindion/Views/RegionPicker.swift", "Hesindion/Views/AdventureCreationSheet.swift"], "verifyCommand": "make build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["grouped RegionPicker by macro-region", "creation sheet uses it, no desert/windy", "builds"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: WeatherDayRow redesign — region, diurnal range, badges
tasks.description:
Row shows region, day/night temps, range + reason (humidity/clouds/wind), edited badge. EN+DE Strings. See plan Task 7.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Hesindion/Views/WeatherDayRow.swift", "Hesindion/Theme/Strings.swift"], "verifyCommand": "make build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["row shows region + range + reason", "edited badge when overrides present", "builds"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Control area + settings cleanup + WeatherRulesSheet (fixes buttons)
tasks.description:
1 full-width primary + 2 equal ghost buttons (uniform, ShareLink restyled); WeatherRulesSheet; settings = default RegionPicker only; tappable rows. EN+DE Strings. See plan Task 8.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Hesindion/Views/AdventureDetailView.swift", "Hesindion/Views/WeatherRulesSheet.swift", "Hesindion/Theme/Strings.swift"], "verifyCommand": "make build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["1 primary + 2 equal ghost buttons, uniform, ShareLink restyled", "WeatherRulesSheet present", "settings = default region only", "rows tappable"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: AddStretchSheet (replaces Next-day / Generate-days / Set-date)
tasks.description:
Single add-stretch sheet (start date + region + #days) with StretchPlanner gap detection; delete BulkGenerateSheet/DateJumpSheet + generateOneDay. See plan Task 9.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Hesindion/Views/AddStretchSheet.swift", "Hesindion/Views/AdventureDetailView.swift", "HesindionTests/StretchGenerationTests.swift"], "verifyCommand": "make test && make build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["add-stretch sheet with date+region+count + sane defaults", "continuity from contiguous day, gap marks isTimeJump", "old sheets deleted", "builds + tests pass"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: DayEditSheet (tap a day to change region / re-roll / override)
tasks.description:
Tap-to-edit day: change region (re-roll from archetype), re-roll non-overridden fields, override values (flagged + preserved). EN+DE Strings. See plan Task 10.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Hesindion/Views/DayEditSheet.swift", "Hesindion/Theme/Strings.swift"], "verifyCommand": "make build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["change region re-rolls keeping overrides", "re-roll only non-overridden fields", "edits set overrides flags", "builds"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: Update test data + snapshots; re-record baselines; final verify
tasks.description:
TestData per-day regions + realistic temps; delete then re-record 24 snapshot PNGs (single sim); final make test && make test-ui green. See plan Task 11.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["HesindionTests/Snapshots/TestData.swift", "HesindionTests/Snapshots/__Snapshots__/AdventureDetailViewSnapshotTests", "HesindionTests/Snapshots/__Snapshots__/WeatherDayRowSnapshotTests"], "verifyCommand": "make test && make test-ui", "acceptanceCriteria": ["sample data uses per-day regions + realistic temps", "all unit tests pass", "snapshot baselines re-recorded and verified green"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
